subtitle.id: Dari kekayaan intelektual hingga pemberdayaan sosial — solusi bisnis terintegrasi yang menggerakkan nilai nyata bagi mitra, komunitas, dan ekosistem kami.
subtitle.en: From intellectual property to social empowerment — integrated business solutions that drive real value for our partners, communities, and ecosystem.

desc.id: Paket waralaba turnkey untuk jaringan distribusi bahan baku alam BOBA Group — termasuk pelatihan, SOP operasional, dan dukungan distribusi nasional.
desc.en: Turnkey franchise packages for BOBA Group's natural raw material distribution network — including training, operational SOPs, and national distribution support.

desc.id: Akses eksklusif paten teknologi kemasan ramah lingkungan dan pola pakaian zero-waste untuk produksi skala komersial.
desc.en: Exclusive access to eco-friendly packaging technology patents and zero-waste garment patterns for commercial-scale production.

desc.id: Pendampingan strategi merek, perlindungan kekayaan intelektual, dan pengembangan portofolio IP untuk bisnis Anda.
desc.en: Brand strategy mentoring, intellectual property protection, and IP portfolio development for your business.

desc.id: Penyaluran bantuan logistik, pakaian layak pakai, makanan, dan kebutuhan darurat untuk korban bencana alam di berbagai wilayah Indonesia.
desc.en: Distribution of logistical aid, usable clothing, food, and emergency supplies for natural disaster victims across Indonesia.

desc.id: Kegiatan berbagi kebutuhan pokok, pakaian, perlengkapan harian, serta dukungan sosial untuk panti asuhan dan panti lansia.
desc.en: Sharing basic necessities, clothing, daily supplies, and social support for orphanages and elderly care homes.

desc.id: Program dapur umum untuk mendistribusikan makanan bergizi kepada komunitas rentan — dikelola bersama BOBA Food Innovations.
desc.en: Community kitchen program distributing nutritious meals to vulnerable communities — managed in collaboration with BOBA Food Innovations.

desc.id: Pendampingan, akses jaringan distribusi BOBA Group, dan modal usaha bergulir bagi UMKM fashion dan komoditas lokal binaan BOBA Foundation.
desc.en: Mentoring, access to BOBA Group distribution networks, and revolving business capital for fashion and local commodity SMEs under BOBA Foundation.

note.id: Butuh solusi kustom atau kemitraan strategis? Tim kami siap merancang paket khusus untuk kebutuhan Anda.
note.en: Need a custom solution or strategic partnership? Our team is ready to design a tailored package for your needs.
